prose: The Fukui reactivity calculation on phenol using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, was completed. The most electrophilic site (atom 3) has Fukui plus value 2.10283, and the most nucleophilic site (atom 1) has Fukui minus value 0.16201. The results are based on a chemkit DFT calculation.
